channel_theory_v12_zenodo_status.context: Halt condition #1 of the PCF2-V12-RELEASE prompt: 'Channel Theory v1.2 has not yet landed on Zenodo (need its cite-all DOI for PCF-2 v1.2 description).'
channel_theory_v12_zenodo_status.finding: sessions/2026-05-01/CHANNEL-THEORY-V12/channel_theory_outline.tex (built locally, 18 pp, 0 errors) cites concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19941678 as 'preserved'. The same DOI is cited verbatim by the prompt as the cite-all DOI to add to PCF-2 v1.2 references. v1.1 of channel theory is recorded in submission_log.txt as 'Published on Zenodo' under DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19941679 (child) and 10.5281/zenodo.19941678 (cite-all/concept). v1.2 of channel theory exists locally but its child DOI has not been verified in submission_log.txt.
channel_theory_v12_zenodo_status.decision: Proceeded under the cite-all/concept DOI (10.5281/zenodo.19941678), which by Zenodo semantics is preserved across v1.1 and v1.2 child versions. PCF-2 v1.2 cites only the concept DOI in the bibitem (Papanokechi2026Channel) and the description's Related-identifiers list, so the PCF-2 record is correct whether the v1.2 child DOI has been minted or not.
channel_theory_v12_zenodo_status.halt_decision: NOT triggered (cite-all DOI is preserved by Zenodo concept-DOI semantics; v1.2 child DOI is irrelevant to the PCF-2 reference).

v12_child_doi_reservation.context: submission_log_patch_item15.txt uses placeholder <TBD-v1.2> for the v1.2 child DOI.
v12_child_doi_reservation.finding: Zenodo mints child DOIs only at Publish-time. The agent does not have web/Zenodo upload access and cannot mint or verify the v1.2 child DOI in this session.
v12_child_doi_reservation.decision: Patch is staged with explicit <TBD-v1.2> placeholder; the user fills this in after pressing Publish on Zenodo. This is documented in the post-condition checklist.

channel_theory_v12_zenodo_upload_open_ac.context: Channel Theory v1.2 PDF exists locally (sessions/2026-05-01/CHANNEL-THEORY-V12/channel_theory_outline.pdf) but has not been uploaded to Zenodo as a 'New version' of concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19941678.
channel_theory_v12_zenodo_upload_open_ac.decision: Recommended in handoff.md as a follow-up user action; not blocking PCF-2 v1.2 because cite-all DOI is preserved.
